TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-frog_Adus
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: aiza andiia sia bununa hai sadus asu mas a sisiuh.
S.PHON: aiða andiia ɕia bununa x~χai sadus asu mas a ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.FORM: aiza andiia sia bununa hai sadus asu mas a sisiuh.
S.PHON: aiða andiia ɕia bununa x~χai sadus asu mas a ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.TRANSL: 在那裡有一個小孩看著狗和青蛙.
There was a small boy looking at a dog and a frog.

W.TRANSL: 可見.中距-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: sia aiza panan dangian sia danuma alipuas asu ingadah a sisiuha.
S.PHON: ɕia aiða panan daŋian ɕia danuma al~ɬipuas asu iŋadax~χ a ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.FORM: sia aiza panan dangian sia danuma alipuas asu ingadah a sisiuha.
S.PHON: ɕia aiða panan daŋian ɕia danuma al~ɬipuas asu iŋadax~χ a ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.TRANSL: 狗照顧一個裝水的瓶子裡面的青蛙.
The dog is keeping a frog in a bottle.

S.FORM: at adii amin uvaaza sadu.
S.PHON: at adii amin uvaaða sadu.
S.FORM: at adii amin uvaaza sadu.
S.PHON: at adii amin uvaaða sadu.

TRANSL.notes: 那個小孩也一直看(青蛙).

S.TRANSL: 那個小孩也一直看 .
The boy is also looking at the frog.

S.FORM: at aiza adiia kucua.
S.PHON: at aiða adiia kuʨua.
S.FORM: at aiza adiia kucua.
S.PHON: at aiða adiia kuʨua.
S.TRANSL: 那裡有鞋子.
There were shoes.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: at minnadii hai masabah a uvaaza alibaan a asua.
S.PHON: at minnadii x~χai masabax~χ a uvaaða al~ɬibaan a asua.
S.FORM: at minnadii hai masabah a uvaaza alibaan a asua.
S.PHON: at minnadii x~χai masabax~χ a uvaaða al~ɬibaan a asua.
S.TRANSL: 到了這裡小孩就抱著狗睡了.

TRANSL.notes: Here (on this page), the boy is holding the dog while sleeping.

S.TRANSL: Here , the boy is holding the dog while sleeping.

S.FORM: ungat mun'apav adiia sisiuha.
S.PHON: uŋat munʔapav adiia ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.FORM: ungat mun'apav adiia sisiuha.
S.PHON: uŋat munʔapav adiia ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.TRANSL: 然後那隻青蛙就跑出去了.
Then the frog runs away.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: namin'uni naias pasisiskun saicia mudadaan.
S.PHON: naminʔuni naias paɕiɕiskun saiʨia mudadaan.
S.FORM: namin'uni naias pasisiskun saicia mudadaan.
S.PHON: naminʔuni naias paɕiɕiskun saiʨia mudadaan.
S.TRANSL: 他們要和他成群地走.
They wanted to leave together.

S.FORM: at minnatasipalin dii hai masabahang a uvaaz at nii asua.
S.PHON: at minnataɕipal~ɬin dii x~χai masabax~χaŋ a uvaað at nii asua.
S.FORM: at minnatasipalin dii hai masabahang a uvaaz at nii asua.
S.PHON: at minnataɕipal~ɬin dii x~χai masabax~χaŋ a uvaað at nii asua.
S.TRANSL: 到了下一頁,小孩還在睡,但是狗沒有.
On this page, the boy iss still sleeping, but the dog isn't.

S.FORM: at ukaang sisiuha ingadahang saia pancia.
S.PHON: at ukaaŋ ɕiɕiux~χa iŋadax~χaŋ saia panʨia.
S.FORM: at ukaang sisiuha ingadahang saia pancia.
S.PHON: at ukaaŋ ɕiɕiux~χa iŋadax~χaŋ saia panʨia.

TRANSL.notes: 然後青蛙還沒有(在這裡),他是不是還在瓶子裡面?

S.TRANSL: 然後青蛙還沒有 ,他是不是還在瓶子裡面?
Then the frog is gone. Is it still inside the bottle?

S.FORM: ingadahang pan mainiiai naingadah sia kucucia.
S.PHON: iŋadax~χaŋ pan mainiiai naiŋadax~χ ɕia kuʨuʨia.
S.FORM: ingadahang pan mainiiai naingadah sia kucucia.
S.PHON: iŋadax~χaŋ pan mainiiai naiŋadax~χ ɕia kuʨuʨia.
S.TRANSL: 是不是還在瓶子裡?不是的話,那麼會在鞋子裡面.
Is it still in the bottle? If not, then it must be in the shoes.

S.FORM: maupacia saia.
S.PHON: maupaʨia saia.
S.FORM: maupacia saia.
S.PHON: maupaʨia saia.
S.TRANSL: 他就那樣.
It's like that.

S.FORM: at minnadiipin hai inkaduanin a sia sisiuha tu naingadah saia sia sapilcia pahasia ansahanun saicia.
S.PHON: at minnadiipin x~χai inkaduanin a ɕia ɕiɕiux~χa tu naiŋadax~χ saia ɕia sapil~ɬʨia pax~χaɕia ansax~χanun saiʨia.
S.FORM: at minnadiipin hai inkaduanin a sia sisiuha tu naingadah saia sia sapilcia pahasia ansahanun saicia.
S.PHON: at minnadiipin x~χai inkaduanin a ɕia ɕiɕiux~χa tu naiŋadax~χ saia ɕia sapil~ɬʨia pax~χaɕia ansax~χanun saiʨia.

TRANSL.notes: 然後這裡呢,(孩子以為)青蛙會在鞋子裡面,可以找到青蛙,所以他把鞋子搬起來.

S.TRANSL: 然後這裡呢, 青蛙會在鞋子裡面,可以找到青蛙,所以他把鞋子搬起來.

TRANSL.notes: Then here, (the boy thingks) the frog might be in the shoes and maybe he will find the frog, so he lifts the shoes.

S.TRANSL: Then here, the frog might be in the shoes and maybe he will find the frog, so he lifts the shoes.

S.FORM: at aupa adii a asu.
S.PHON: at aupa adii a asu.
S.FORM: at aupa adii a asu.
S.PHON: at aupa adii a asu.
S.TRANSL: 然後那隻狗一直到處看.
Then the dog is searching as well.

S.FORM: at aupa minnadiipin hai idiipin saia malala'la kikilim tu isa munpungav.
S.PHON: at aupa minnadiipin x~χai idiipin saia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa kikil~ɬim tu isa munpuŋav.
S.FORM: at aupa minnadiipin hai idiipin saia malala'la kikilim tu isa munpungav.
S.PHON: at aupa minnadiipin x~χai idiipin saia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa kikil~ɬim tu isa munpuŋav.
S.TRANSL: 然後這裡呢,他在這裡一直喊叫一直找說:「在哪裡走丟呢?」
Until here, he keeps on shouting and looking: "Where did you go?"

S.FORM: isuka adii sisiuha.
S.PHON: isuka adii ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.FORM: isuka adii sisiuha.
S.PHON: isuka adii ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙消失了.
That frog disappeared!

S.FORM: at kaupas asucia malmangha amin asu malala'la.
S.PHON: at kaupas asuʨia mal~ɬmaŋx~χa amin asu mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa.
S.FORM: at kaupas asucia malmangha amin asu malala'la.
S.PHON: at kaupas asuʨia mal~ɬmaŋx~χa amin asu mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa.
S.TRANSL: 然後只有狗在往上看,並且一直叫著.
Then there's only the dog looking up and calling for it.

S.FORM: isia lumah hai kui uka.
S.PHON: iɕia l~ɬumax~χ x~χai kui uka.
S.FORM: isia lumah hai kui uka.
S.PHON: iɕia l~ɬumax~χ x~χai kui uka.
S.TRANSL: 家裡也沒有,該怎麼辦!
It's not in the house. What should we do?

S.FORM: at adiia asu ka ingadah amin sia pan.
S.PHON: at adiia asu ka iŋadax~χ amin ɕia pan.
S.FORM: at adiia asu ka ingadah amin sia pan.
S.PHON: at adiia asu ka iŋadax~χ amin ɕia pan.
S.TRANSL: 然後那隻狗也就到瓶子裡面.
Then the dog also got into the bottle.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: at adiia uvaaza isia siul lumah malmamangdav mastatala.
S.PHON: at adiia uvaaða iɕia ɕiul~ɬ l~ɬumax~χ mal~ɬmamaŋdav mastatal~ɬa.
S.FORM: at adiia uvaaza isia siul lumah malmamangdav mastatala.
S.PHON: at adiia uvaaða iɕia ɕiul~ɬ l~ɬumax~χ mal~ɬmamaŋdav mastatal~ɬa.
S.TRANSL: 那個孩子在窗口往下望著,一直等待著.
The boy kept on looking down from the window and waiting.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格
主焦-狀態-重疊-從懸崖往下看

S.FORM: at minsuma asua hai damuun saicia sikaput.
S.PHON: at minsuma asua x~χai damuun saiʨia ɕikaput.
S.FORM: at minsuma asua hai damuun saicia sikaput.
S.PHON: at minsuma asua x~χai damuun saiʨia ɕikaput.
S.TRANSL: 然後狗也來,他把狗抓起抱緊.
Then the dog also came. He held it tightly.

S.FORM: at ukaang a sisiuh.
S.PHON: at ukaaŋ a ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.FORM: at ukaang a sisiuh.
S.PHON: at ukaaŋ a ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.TRANSL: 然後還是沒有青蛙.
But there was still no trace of the frog.

S.FORM: a naaiza aupa tu dudusa.
S.PHON: a naaiða aupa tu dudusa.
S.FORM: a naaiza aupa tu dudusa.
S.PHON: a naaiða aupa tu dudusa.
S.TRANSL: 是不是會有兩個? [孩子跟狗]
Are there two of them? [boy and dog]

S.FORM: at minnadii diian hai malala'laang mudaan naia amin maisinalumah.
S.PHON: at minnadii diian x~χai mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬaaŋ mudaan naia amin maiɕinal~ɬumax~χ.
S.FORM: at minnadii diian hai malala'laang mudaan naia amin maisinalumah.
S.PHON: at minnadii diian x~χai mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬaaŋ mudaan naia amin maiɕinal~ɬumax~χ.
S.TRANSL: 然後到了這裡呢,他們還在叫喊著,一邊從家裡出去.
Here, they were still calling and leaving the house.

S.FORM: tandudusa asucia malala'la kikilim.
S.PHON: tandudusa asuʨia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa kikil~ɬim.
S.FORM: tandudusa asucia malala'la kikilim.
S.PHON: tandudusa asuʨia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa kikil~ɬim.
S.TRANSL: 兩個人一邊一起走著,一邊叫喊,一邊找尋.
The two of them went together, calling out loud and looking around.

S.FORM: uka at usaduas pahusaz tu aiza idii pahusaza isia libusa isia lukis malkazingking.
S.PHON: uka at usaduas pax~χusað tu aiða idii pax~χusaða iɕia l~ɬibusa iɕia l~ɬukis mal~ɬkaðiŋkiŋ.
S.FORM: uka at usaduas pahusaz tu aiza idii pahusaza isia libusa isia lukis malkazingking.
S.PHON: uka at usaduas pax~χusað tu aiða idii pax~χusaða iɕia l~ɬibusa iɕia l~ɬukis mal~ɬkaðiŋkiŋ.
S.TRANSL: 沒有.然後他們在樹林裡看得到有虎頭蜂窩掛在樹上.
It was not there. Then in the forest they saw there was a hornet nest on the tree.

S.FORM: hai ka uka at kusbabai duma tauk tasatasa pahusaza akadii minnadii hai.
S.PHON: x~χai ka uka at kusbabai duma tauk tasatasa pax~χusaða akadii minnadii x~χai.
S.FORM: hai ka uka at kusbabai duma tauk tasatasa pahusaza akadii minnadii hai.
S.PHON: x~χai ka uka at kusbabai duma tauk tasatasa pax~χusaða akadii minnadii x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 沒有.然後虎頭一隻一隻飛出來,到處飛.
Not here. Then the hornets flied out around one by one.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-途中某處-那裡

S.FORM: minkakalapat a asua asa maus pahusazcia.
S.PHON: minkakal~ɬapat a asua asa maus pax~χusaðʨia.
S.FORM: minkakalapat a asua asa maus pahusazcia.
S.PHON: minkakal~ɬapat a asua asa maus pax~χusaðʨia.
S.TRANSL: 狗一直想要爬上去吃虎頭蜂.
The dog wanted to climb up the whole time to eat the hornet nest.

S.FORM: masisivit adiia ingadahcia sisiuh hai.
S.PHON: maɕiɕivit adiia iŋadax~χʨia ɕiɕiux~χ x~χai.
S.FORM: masisivit adiia ingadahcia sisiuh hai.
S.PHON: maɕiɕivit adiia iŋadax~χʨia ɕiɕiux~χ x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 他一直看青蛙是不是在裡面.
He kept on looking if the frog was inside.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距=那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: amus minnatasipalincia mais sivitun a laak adu ingadah minnatasipalin at mapising a uvaaza mas cin tumbak adiia hai namuzaszas a pahusaza at masisivit a sisiuha tu mikuabis uvaazan namapa'ias tahis.
S.PHON: amus minnataɕipal~ɬinʨia mais ɕivitun a l~ɬaak adu iŋadax~χ minnataɕipal~ɬin at mapiɕiŋ a uvaaða mas ʨin tumbak adiia x~χai namuðasðas a pax~χusaða at maɕiɕivit a ɕiɕiux~χa tu mikuabis uvaaðan namapaʔias tax~χis.
S.FORM: amus minnatasipalincia mais sivitun a laak adu ingadah minnatasipalin at mapising a uvaaza mas cin tumbak adiia hai namuzaszas a pahusaza at masisivit a sisiuha tu mikuabis uvaazan namapa'ias tahis.
S.PHON: amus minnataɕipal~ɬinʨia mais ɕivitun a l~ɬaak adu iŋadax~χ minnataɕipal~ɬin at mapiɕiŋ a uvaaða mas ʨin tumbak adiia x~χai namuðasðas a pax~χusaða at maɕiɕivit a ɕiɕiux~χa tu mikuabis uvaaðan namapaʔias tax~χis.
S.TRANSL: 原來,在下一頁孩子擔心當他在觀察洞裡的時候,那個虎頭蜂窩會掉下來.然後青蛙一直繼續觀察到底這個孩子會如何擋他的臉.
It turns out on the next page that the kid was afraid when he looked inside the hole, the nest would suddenly drop. Then the frog kept on seeing how the kid covered his face.

W.TRANSL: 變成-到-對面=改變狀態=遠距.斜格
可見.遠距=那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: at maza asua hai asa maus pahusazcia.
S.PHON: at maða asua x~χai asa maus pax~χusaðʨia.
S.FORM: at maza asua hai asa maus pahusazcia.
S.PHON: at maða asua x~χai asa maus pax~χusaðʨia.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗想要吃虎頭蜂.
That dog wants to eat the hornets.

S.FORM: hai mikuin a mapising a uvaaza hai mais cinhaiap hai nakasinapun.
S.PHON: x~χai mikuin a mapiɕiŋ a uvaaða x~χai mais ʨinx~χaiap x~χai nakaɕinapun.
S.FORM: hai mikuin a mapising a uvaaza hai mais cinhaiap hai nakasinapun.
S.PHON: x~χai mikuin a mapiɕiŋ a uvaaða x~χai mais ʨinx~χaiap x~χai nakaɕinapun.
S.TRANSL: 孩子害怕,如果突然知道,被追了要怎麼辦.
But the child was afraid. What should he do if he is chased since it suddenly knows?

S.FORM: maza asu hai nii tu mapising malkalapat tu asa maun.
S.PHON: maða asu x~χai nii tu mapiɕiŋ mal~ɬkal~ɬapat tu asa maun.
S.FORM: maza asu hai nii tu mapising malkalapat tu asa maun.
S.PHON: maða asu x~χai nii tu mapiɕiŋ mal~ɬkal~ɬapat tu asa maun.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗不怕,繼續往上看,想要吃.
That dog was not afraid, staying there and looking up, eager to eat.

S.FORM: at aupa adiia at adii hai sibuzbuzun sihalhalun hai ka makbina cinsivusin amina adiia tu mazanga nakaununtas pahusazcia hai askadii sia lumah tu halhalun mun'apav maupatia.
S.PHON: at aupa adiia at adii x~χai ɕibuðbuðun ɕix~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬun x~χai ka makbina ʨinɕivuɕin amina adiia tu maðaŋa nakaununtas pax~χusaðʨia x~χai askadii ɕia l~ɬumax~χ tu x~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬun munʔapav maupatia.
S.FORM: at aupa adiia at adii hai sibuzbuzun sihalhalun hai ka makbina cinsivusin amina adiia tu mazanga nakaununtas pahusazcia hai askadii sia lumah tu halhalun mun'apav maupatia.
S.PHON: at aupa adiia at adii x~χai ɕibuðbuðun ɕix~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬun x~χai ka makbina ʨinɕivuɕin amina adiia tu maðaŋa nakaununtas pax~χusaðʨia x~χai askadii ɕia l~ɬumax~χ tu x~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬun munʔapav maupatia.
S.TRANSL: 因為那個被拉掉下來... 看吧!他們突然都轉頭,那些要吃我們的虎頭蜂,就從牠們掉下來的家出來了.
It was pulled down… Look, suddenly they all turned their heads — those hornets that would eat us were just coming out from the nest which had dropped down.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距=那裡=遠距.主格
可見.遠距=那裡=遠距.主格
非實現=吃-受焦=1IPL.主格=斜格
可見.遠距-途中某處-那裡

S.FORM: ai minnadii masisinap minnadii sia bununcia hai namikua saia.
S.PHON: ai minnadii maɕiɕinap minnadii ɕia bununʨia x~χai namikua saia.
S.FORM: ai minnadii masisinap minnadii sia bununcia hai namikua saia.
S.PHON: ai minnadii maɕiɕinap minnadii ɕia bununʨia x~χai namikua saia.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)追他追到那去了.他怎麼辦呢?

S.TRANSL: 追他追到那去了.他怎麼辦呢?

TRANSL.notes: (They) chased the person till there. What could he do?

S.TRANSL: chased the person till there. What could he do?

S.FORM: natunghabin saia sia libuscia sian sinluum.
S.PHON: natuŋx~χabin saia ɕia l~ɬibusʨia ɕian ɕinl~ɬuum.
S.FORM: natunghabin saia sia libuscia sian sinluum.
S.PHON: natuŋx~χabin saia ɕia l~ɬibusʨia ɕian ɕinl~ɬuum.
S.TRANSL: 他會躲在那個森林?還是這裡會有牆壁嗎?
Would he hide in that forest? Was there a wall?

S.FORM: lukis tunghabin saia ngadahcia.
S.PHON: l~ɬukis tuŋx~χabin saia ŋadax~χʨia.
S.FORM: lukis tunghabin saia ngadahcia.
S.PHON: l~ɬukis tuŋx~χabin saia ŋadax~χʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他躲在那棵樹裡面.
He hides inside that tree.

S.FORM: nasinapus pahusazcia.
S.PHON: naɕinapus pax~χusaðʨia.
S.FORM: nasinapus pahusazcia.
S.PHON: naɕinapus pax~χusaðʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他會被虎頭蜂追.
He would be chased by the hornets.

S.FORM: hai maza asu hai valavalaang isia lukis malkalapat tu maihalhal mas pahusaz.
S.PHON: x~χai maða asu x~χai val~ɬaval~ɬaaŋ iɕia l~ɬukis mal~ɬkal~ɬapat tu maix~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ mas pax~χusað.
S.FORM: hai maza asu hai valavalaang isia lukis malkalapat tu maihalhal mas pahusaz.
S.PHON: x~χai maða asu x~χai val~ɬaval~ɬaaŋ iɕia l~ɬukis mal~ɬkal~ɬapat tu maix~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ mas pax~χusað.
S.TRANSL: 可是那隻狗,還是毫無知覺地,在樹木那邊虎視眈眈地往上看那已經掉下來的虎頭蜂窩.
But that dog, still unaware, kept looking up at the tree for the hornet's nest that had already fallen down.

S.FORM: mapising amin diia malala'la mastatala tu isabis imita cina.
S.PHON: mapiɕiŋ amin diia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa mastatal~ɬa tu isabis imita ʨina.
S.FORM: mapising amin diia malala'la mastatala tu isabis imita cina.
S.PHON: mapiɕiŋ amin diia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa mastatal~ɬa tu isabis imita ʨina.
S.TRANSL: 大家害怕,一邊等待一邊大叫:「媽媽到底在哪裡?」
Everybody was afraid over there and kept waiting and screaming "where is our mom?"

S.FORM: at minnadii hai ka minsuma ithuuan at ka askadiia pahusaza at.
S.PHON: at minnadii x~χai ka minsuma itx~χuuan at ka askadiia pax~χusaða at.
S.FORM: at minnadii hai ka minsuma ithuuan at ka askadiia pahusaza at.
S.PHON: at minnadii x~χai ka minsuma itx~χuuan at ka askadiia pax~χusaða at.
S.TRANSL: 然後那裡,來了一隻貓頭鷹,而虎頭蜂也到了那裡.
Then there, an owl came, and then the hornets got there.

W.TRANSL: 可見-途中某處-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: sinapun a asu hai aupa maihalhal.
S.PHON: ɕinapun a asu x~χai aupa maix~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ.
S.FORM: sinapun a asu hai aupa maihalhal.
S.PHON: ɕinapun a asu x~χai aupa maix~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ.

TRANSL.notes: 狗被追,是因為牠弄掉了(虎頭蜂窩).

S.TRANSL: 狗被追,是因為牠弄掉了 .

TRANSL.notes: The dog was chased because he had taken down (the hornet).

S.TRANSL: The dog was chased because he had taken down .

S.FORM: mmm kaz a uvaaza ka mabis kandundah saitan adii ai.
S.PHON: mmm kað a uvaaða ka mabis kandundax~χ saitan adii ai.
S.FORM: mmm kaz a uvaaza ka mabis kandundah saitan adii ai.
S.PHON: mmm kað a uvaaða ka mabis kandundax~χ saitan adii ai.
S.TRANSL: 然後孩子,是誰踢的呢?
As for the children, who kicked him?

S.FORM: maltataunghu sia cinunghabinan saicia tu mazang hai masitaunghu vakala.
S.PHON: mal~ɬtatauŋx~χu ɕia ʨinuŋx~χabinan saiʨia tu maðaŋ x~χai maɕitauŋx~χu vakal~ɬa.
S.FORM: maltataunghu sia cinunghabinan saicia tu mazang hai masitaunghu vakala.
S.PHON: mal~ɬtatauŋx~χu ɕia ʨinuŋx~χabinan saiʨia tu maðaŋ x~χai maɕitauŋx~χu vakal~ɬa.
S.TRANSL: 他四腳朝天地倒在他躲過的地方.
He fell on his back at where he had hidden.

S.FORM: ukaang a sisiuh inkaduas saicia.
S.PHON: ukaaŋ a ɕiɕiux~χ inkaduas saiʨia.
S.FORM: ukaang a sisiuh inkaduas saicia.
S.PHON: ukaaŋ a ɕiɕiux~χ inkaduas saiʨia.
S.TRANSL: 可是仍然找不到青蛙.
The frog still could't be found.

S.FORM: mmm hai mabis kandundah.
S.PHON: mmm x~χai mabis kandundax~χ.
S.FORM: mmm hai mabis kandundah.
S.PHON: mmm x~χai mabis kandundax~χ.
S.TRANSL: 是誰踢的?
Who had kicked it?

S.FORM: mmm ithuutan.
S.PHON: mmm itx~χuutan.
S.FORM: mmm ithuutan.
S.PHON: mmm itx~χuutan.
S.TRANSL: 是貓頭鷹吧?
It was the owl, right?

S.FORM: kandundahas ithuucia. a
S.PHON: kandundax~χas itx~χuuʨia. a
S.FORM: kandundahas ithuucia. a
S.PHON: kandundax~χas itx~χuuʨia. a
S.TRANSL: 是被貓頭鷹踢的,是吧?
It was kicked by the owl, right?

S.FORM: ung hangsia ingadah ithuua sia lukiscia hai kungadahus saicia kikilim hai ka kandundahan a saia.
S.PHON: uŋ x~χaŋɕia iŋadax~χ itx~χuua ɕia l~ɬukisʨia x~χai kuŋadax~χus saiʨia kikil~ɬim x~χai ka kandundax~χan a saia.
S.FORM: ung hangsia ingadah ithuua sia lukiscia hai kungadahus saicia kikilim hai ka kandundahan a saia.
S.PHON: uŋ x~χaŋɕia iŋadax~χ itx~χuua ɕia l~ɬukisʨia x~χai kuŋadax~χus saiʨia kikil~ɬim x~χai ka kandundax~χan a saia.
S.TRANSL: 原來貓頭鷹在樹裡面.他到裡面一直找,然後把他踢了.
It turned out the owl was inside the tree. It went in there and found and kicked him out.

S.FORM: mmm aupa macisbai a asua hai kui askadii pahusaz tu masisinapa.
S.PHON: mmm aupa maʨisbai a asua x~χai kui askadii pax~χusað tu maɕiɕinapa.
S.FORM: mmm aupa macisbai a asua hai kui askadii pahusaz tu masisinapa.
S.PHON: mmm aupa maʨisbai a asua x~χai kui askadii pax~χusað tu maɕiɕinapa.
S.TRANSL: 狗就突然跑走,因為那邊的虎頭蜂一直在追.

TRANSL.notes: Then the dog suddenly ran off because the hornets there kept chasing (it).

S.TRANSL: Then the dog suddenly ran off because the hornets there kept chasing .

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-途中某處-那裡
主焦<重疊>追趕=遠距.主格

S.FORM: at minnadii askadiip amin minduav kananu diia mapa'ia bungu tu namikua mais minsuma pahusaz ka.
S.PHON: at minnadii askadiip amin minduav kananu diia mapaʔia buŋu tu namikua mais minsuma pax~χusað ka.
S.FORM: at minnadii askadiip amin minduav kananu diia mapa'ia bungu tu namikua mais minsuma pahusaz ka.
S.PHON: at minnadii askadiip amin minduav kananu diia mapaʔia buŋu tu namikua mais minsuma pax~χusað ka.
S.TRANSL: 然後所以年輕人從那邊去那邊,盡量在那裡擋住頭.如果虎頭蜂來的話要怎麼辦?所以這樣.
Then all the young people went there and tried their best to cover their head. How would it be if the hornets came? Just this way.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-途中某處-那裡

S.FORM: malala'laang a saia hai kui uka at aizin a hanvang tu ngabul mun'apav a hanvanga tu.
S.PHON: mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬaaŋ a saia x~χai kui uka at aiðin a x~χanvaŋ tu ŋabul~ɬ munʔapav a x~χanvaŋa tu.
S.FORM: malala'laang a saia hai kui uka at aizin a hanvang tu ngabul mun'apav a hanvanga tu.
S.PHON: mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬaaŋ a saia x~χai kui uka at aiðin a x~χanvaŋ tu ŋabul~ɬ munʔapav a x~χanvaŋa tu.
S.TRANSL: 她一直叫著,但還是沒有,然後有了水鹿的鹿角,水鹿出現了.
He was still calling but still it wasn't there. Then it was deer's antlers — the deer came out.

S.FORM: namindangaz saicin.
S.PHON: namindaŋað saiʨin.
S.FORM: namindangaz saicin.
S.PHON: namindaŋað saiʨin.
S.TRANSL: 牠會幫助他嗎?
Will it help him?

S.FORM: at minnadii hai kui itasipalin asua.
S.PHON: at minnadii x~χai kui itaɕipal~ɬin asua.
S.FORM: at minnadii hai kui itasipalin asua.
S.PHON: at minnadii x~χai kui itaɕipal~ɬin asua.
S.TRANSL: 然後已經到對面的狗怎麼到的呢?
Then how would the dog that is already on the other side get there?

S.FORM: idadaza saia sia ludun.
S.PHON: idadaða saia ɕia l~ɬudun.
S.FORM: idadaza saia sia ludun.
S.PHON: idadaða saia ɕia l~ɬudun.
S.TRANSL: 他在山上.
He is in the mountain.

S.FORM: aiza ngabula malala'la mas sisiuh.
S.PHON: aiða ŋabul~ɬa mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa mas ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.FORM: aiza ngabula malala'la mas sisiuh.
S.PHON: aiða ŋabul~ɬa mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa mas ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.TRANSL: 有一隻鹿,一直叫著青蛙.
There was a deer, it keeps on calling a frog.

S.FORM: mmm lala'laus saicia sisiuh tu minsumaa hai ka uka minsusuma.
S.PHON: mmm l~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬaus saiʨia ɕiɕiux~χ tu minsumaa x~χai ka uka minsusuma.
S.FORM: mmm lala'laus saicia sisiuh tu minsumaa hai ka uka minsusuma.
S.PHON: mmm l~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬaus saiʨia ɕiɕiux~χ tu minsumaa x~χai ka uka minsusuma.
S.TRANSL: 他一直叫那個青蛙:「來吧!」但一直沒有來.
It kept calling the frog: "Come!" But still he didn't come.

S.FORM: at minnadii hai mun'apavin a hanvanga adadazadii uvaaza sia hanvanga malala'la at anastu asua malala'la amin kikilim.
S.PHON: at minnadii x~χai munʔapavin a x~χanvaŋa adadaðadii uvaaða ɕia x~χanvaŋa mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa at anastu asua mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa amin kikil~ɬim.
S.FORM: at minnadii hai mun'apavin a hanvanga adadazadii uvaaza sia hanvanga malala'la at anastu asua malala'la amin kikilim.
S.PHON: at minnadii x~χai munʔapavin a x~χanvaŋa adadaðadii uvaaða ɕia x~χanvaŋa mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa at anastu asua mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa amin kikil~ɬim.
S.TRANSL: 然後那邊,水鹿出來了,孩子在上面一直叫.狗也在下面叫著,尋找著.
Then there, the deer came out with the child kept yelling on it. The dog yelled and searched below.

W.TRANSL: 主焦-前進-外面-改變狀態
可見.遠距-重疊-上面=那裡

S.FORM: at askadiipin sia ngabula mamamas uvaaz.
S.PHON: at askadiipin ɕia ŋabul~ɬa mamamas uvaað.
S.FORM: at askadiipin sia ngabula mamamas uvaaz.
S.PHON: at askadiipin ɕia ŋabul~ɬa mamamas uvaað.
S.TRANSL: 然後,鹿背著孩子.
Then there, the deer carried the child on its back.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-途中某處-那裡=改變狀態

S.FORM: askadii asua kikilim sia ismuut hai ka uka sia lukis hai uka at.
S.PHON: askadii asua kikil~ɬim ɕia ismuut x~χai ka uka ɕia l~ɬukis x~χai uka at.
S.FORM: askadii asua kikilim sia ismuut hai ka uka sia lukis hai uka at.
S.PHON: askadii asua kikil~ɬim ɕia ismuut x~χai ka uka ɕia l~ɬukis x~χai uka at.
S.TRANSL: 到了那邊,狗在草裡找,沒有;他在樹上找,沒有.
The dog got there and looked on the grass, but it wasn't there; on the tree, but it wasn't there.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-途中某處-那裡

S.FORM: at aizin a adiia aupa adiia hai ukaang inkaduan minnadiipin hai adiipin asua inkaduanin sisiuha.
S.PHON: at aiðin a adiia aupa adiia x~χai ukaaŋ inkaduan minnadiipin x~χai adiipin asua inkaduanin ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.FORM: at aizin a adiia aupa adiia hai ukaang inkaduan minnadiipin hai adiipin asua inkaduanin sisiuha.
S.PHON: at aiðin a adiia aupa adiia x~χai ukaaŋ inkaduan minnadiipin x~χai adiipin asua inkaduanin ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.TRANSL: 然後有了那個.因為那裡還是沒有找到,狗到那邊找到青蛙.
Then there it was. Because there was still nothing to be found, the dog got there and found the frog.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格
可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: ai ka minkuabis adiia tu kantunghaz amin ka pistunghaz.
S.PHON: ai ka minkuabis adiia tu kantuŋx~χað amin ka pistuŋx~χað.
S.FORM: ai ka minkuabis adiia tu kantunghaz amin ka pistunghaz.
S.PHON: ai ka minkuabis adiia tu kantuŋx~χað amin ka pistuŋx~χað.
S.TRANSL: 嗯,然後怎麼了,他被踢了,他掉下來了
Uhm, how was it over there, he was kicked, he fell.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: namaikusnasian aupa saia sia adii tu ismuuttan mun'apav.
S.PHON: namaikusnaɕian aupa saia ɕia adii tu ismuuttan munʔapav.
S.FORM: namaikusnasian aupa saia sia adii tu ismuuttan mun'apav.
S.PHON: namaikusnaɕian aupa saia ɕia adii tu ismuuttan munʔapav.
S.TRANSL: 他是不是從這個草出來的?
Did he come out from the grass there?

S.FORM: minnasaincia at aizin a adiia hazama dadusa sinuka maisinuk hazam hai.
S.PHON: minnasainʨia at aiðin a adiia x~χaðama dadusa ɕinuka maiɕinuk x~χaðam x~χai.
S.FORM: minnasaincia at aizin a adiia hazama dadusa sinuka maisinuk hazam hai.
S.PHON: minnasainʨia at aiðin a adiia x~χaðama dadusa ɕinuka maiɕinuk x~χaðam x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 到那邊有了兩隻鳥和巢,空巢.
To there, there were two birds and a nest, an empty nest.

W.TRANSL: 變成-到-處格.近距=遠距.斜格
可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: naminnasaincia aupa naia mais sanganin sadu tu at makua sian kungadah sia libuscia.
S.PHON: naminnasainʨia aupa naia mais saŋanin sadu tu at makua ɕian kuŋadax~χ ɕia l~ɬibusʨia.
S.FORM: naminnasaincia aupa naia mais sanganin sadu tu at makua sian kungadah sia libuscia.
S.PHON: naminnasainʨia aupa naia mais saŋanin sadu tu at makua ɕian kuŋadax~χ ɕia l~ɬibusʨia.
S.TRANSL: 到那邊,因為當他們待會看到... 他們怎麼進到那個樹林?
To there, later when they saw… How would he go inside the forest?

W.TRANSL: 非實現=變成-到-處格.近距=遠距.斜格

S.FORM: ai maupacia tu maupa tu mais inaak tu saduan ana hanvangcia ciu naitan minaizin sisiuha tu minaiza ngabulan mun'apavan.
S.PHON: ai maupaʨia tu maupa tu mais inaak tu saduan ana x~χanvaŋʨia ʨiu naitan minaiðin ɕiɕiux~χa tu minaiða ŋabul~ɬan munʔapavan.
S.FORM: ai maupacia tu maupa tu mais inaak tu saduan ana hanvangcia ciu naitan minaizin sisiuha tu minaiza ngabulan mun'apavan.
S.PHON: ai maupaʨia tu maupa tu mais inaak tu saduan ana x~χanvaŋʨia ʨiu naitan minaiðin ɕiɕiux~χa tu minaiða ŋabul~ɬan munʔapavan.
S.TRANSL: 就像這樣,像我所看到的,水鹿救了他們,青蛙和水鹿的出現.
Just like that, like what I see, the deer saved them, the frog and the deer's appearance.

W.TRANSL: 主焦-前進-外面-中距.主格

S.FORM: maupacia nii aupa ukas ciu naitan.
S.PHON: maupaʨia nii aupa ukas ʨiu naitan.
S.FORM: maupacia nii aupa ukas ciu naitan.
S.PHON: maupaʨia nii aupa ukas ʨiu naitan.
S.TRANSL: 這樣子,沒有救他們嗎?
So, they didn't get saved?

S.FORM: ungat minnadii hai ka undusaanin a uvaaza mas asu maltatakzang tu.
S.PHON: uŋat minnadii x~χai ka undusaanin a uvaaða mas asu mal~ɬtatakðaŋ tu.
S.FORM: ungat minnadii hai ka undusaanin a uvaaza mas asu maltatakzang tu.
S.PHON: uŋat minnadii x~χai ka undusaanin a uvaaða mas asu mal~ɬtatakðaŋ tu.
S.TRANSL: 然後,孩子和狗兩個一起躺著.
Then, the child and the dog lay down together.

W.TRANSL: 人一起-二-處焦=改變狀態

S.FORM: mun'apavin sia danum danum naia iskaupduh.
S.PHON: munʔapavin ɕia danum danum naia iskaupdux~χ.
S.FORM: mun'apavin sia danum danum naia iskaupduh.
S.PHON: munʔapavin ɕia danum danum naia iskaupdux~χ.
S.TRANSL: 他們從水出來,他們被丟進水去了.
They came out of the water, they were thrown in the water.

W.TRANSL: 主焦-前進-外面-改變狀態

S.FORM: adii hanvanga malsisivit tu naciu.
S.PHON: adii x~χanvaŋa mal~ɬɕiɕivit tu naʨiu.
S.FORM: adii hanvanga malsisivit tu naciu.
S.PHON: adii x~χanvaŋa mal~ɬɕiɕivit tu naʨiu.
S.TRANSL: 那隻鹿一直觀察他們是否被救.
That deer kept seeing if they were saved.

S.FORM: minnadii mun'apavin sia danum hai.
S.PHON: minnadii munʔapavin ɕia danum x~χai.
S.FORM: minnadii mun'apavin sia danum hai.
S.PHON: minnadii munʔapavin ɕia danum x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 到那邊,他們從水中出來.

TRANSL.notes: Here (on this page), they came out of the water.

S.TRANSL: Here , they came out of the water.

W.TRANSL: 主焦-前進-外面-改變狀態

S.FORM: at ka masasiahu tu ka asua anbunguun saicia ciu at.
S.PHON: at ka masaɕiax~χu tu ka asua anbuŋuun saiʨia ʨiu at.
S.FORM: at ka masasiahu tu ka asua anbunguun saicia ciu at.
S.PHON: at ka masaɕiax~χu tu ka asua anbuŋuun saiʨia ʨiu at.
S.TRANSL: 然後,相反,小狗被他頂在頭上救.
Then, on the contrary, the dog was saved by being held on his head.

S.FORM: ukaang a sisiuh mun'apav.
S.PHON: ukaaŋ a ɕiɕiux~χ munʔapav.
S.FORM: ukaang a sisiuh mun'apav.
S.PHON: ukaaŋ a ɕiɕiux~χ munʔapav.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙還沒出來.
The frog still hadn't come out yet.

S.FORM: mmm naminnasia andii mazan sisiuh mun'apav.
S.PHON: mmm naminnaɕia andii maðan ɕiɕiux~χ munʔapav.
S.FORM: mmm naminnasia andii mazan sisiuh mun'apav.
S.PHON: mmm naminnaɕia andii maðan ɕiɕiux~χ munʔapav.
S.TRANSL: 到了這裡,青蛙出來嗎?
Here, did the frog come out?

S.FORM: minnadii hai mun'apav a asu sia danum hai tupaus saicia tu kaa tu pataliva na aiza sisiuh.
S.PHON: minnadii x~χai munʔapav a asu ɕia danum x~χai tupaus saiʨia tu kaa tu patal~ɬiva na aiða ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.FORM: minnadii hai mun'apav a asu sia danum hai tupaus saicia tu kaa tu pataliva na aiza sisiuh.
S.PHON: minnadii x~χai munʔapav a asu ɕia danum x~χai tupaus saiʨia tu kaa tu patal~ɬiva na aiða ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.TRANSL: 到這裡,狗從水出來,他叫狗不要出聲,會有青蛙.
Here, the dog came out from the water and it was told not to speak because there would be frogs.

S.FORM: at aupa minnadii hai mun'apav a asua at nasi'apav saia sisiuh adii.
S.PHON: at aupa minnadii x~χai munʔapav a asua at naɕiʔapav saia ɕiɕiux~χ adii.
S.FORM: at aupa minnadii hai mun'apav a asua at nasi'apav saia sisiuh adii.
S.PHON: at aupa minnadii x~χai munʔapav a asua at naɕiʔapav saia ɕiɕiux~χ adii.
S.TRANSL: 到那裡,狗出現.他會不會把青蛙拉出來?

TRANSL.notes: Then here (on this page), the dog came out. Would it pull out frogs there?

S.TRANSL: Then here , the dog came out. Would it pull out frogs there?

S.FORM: mmm malmamangdav sia lukis tu uvaaz tu uhtung.
S.PHON: mmm mal~ɬmamaŋdav ɕia l~ɬukis tu uvaað tu ux~χtuŋ.
S.FORM: mmm malmamangdav sia lukis tu uvaaz tu uhtung.
S.PHON: mmm mal~ɬmamaŋdav ɕia l~ɬukis tu uvaað tu ux~χtuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 孩子從木頭往下面看.
The child looked down from the piece of wood.

W.TRANSL: 主焦-狀態-<Ca重疊>從懸崖往下看

S.FORM: mmm adii masisivit tu na minsuma sisiuh.
S.PHON: mmm adii maɕiɕivit tu na minsuma ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.FORM: mmm adii masisivit tu na minsuma sisiuh.
S.PHON: mmm adii maɕiɕivit tu na minsuma ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.TRANSL: 他那邊一直看青蛙來了沒.
He kept looking over there, wondering if the frog would appear.

S.FORM: at tupaus adiita asua tu pataliva kaa tu lulunglung tu'ia.
S.PHON: at tupaus adiita asua tu patal~ɬiva kaa tu l~ɬul~ɬuŋl~ɬuŋ tuʔia.
S.FORM: at tupaus adiita asua tu pataliva kaa tu lulunglung tu'ia.
S.PHON: at tupaus adiita asua tu patal~ɬiva kaa tu l~ɬul~ɬuŋl~ɬuŋ tuʔia.
S.TRANSL: 然後他叫狗不要汪汪地吠或嗥叫.
Then he told the dog not to bark or howl.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=中距.屬格

S.FORM: at minnadiipin hai tuza tu adiipin at sisiuha undusaan.
S.PHON: at minnadiipin x~χai tuða tu adiipin at ɕiɕiux~χa undusaan.
S.FORM: at minnadiipin hai tuza tu adiipin at sisiuha undusaan.
S.PHON: at minnadiipin x~χai tuða tu adiipin at ɕiɕiux~χa undusaan.
S.TRANSL: 這裡,真的有兩隻青蛙在一起.
Then here, there were really two frogs together.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=改變狀態

S.FORM: at manaskalin naia tu aizin a sian.
S.PHON: at manaskal~ɬin naia tu aiðin a ɕian.
S.FORM: at manaskalin naia tu aizin a sian.
S.PHON: at manaskal~ɬin naia tu aiðin a ɕian.
S.TRANSL: 他們很開心有了他.
They were happy that here it was.

S.FORM: nakudii a asua nasiza saicia naciu saicia maliba.
S.PHON: nakudii a asua naɕiða saiʨia naʨiu saiʨia mal~ɬiba.
S.FORM: nakudii a asua nasiza saicia naciu saicia maliba.
S.PHON: nakudii a asua naɕiða saiʨia naʨiu saiʨia mal~ɬiba.
S.TRANSL: 狗要去救他,把他抱起來.
The dog would go take and save him, holding him in his arms.

S.FORM: at aupa minnadiipin naia kudadazain sia lukis saia at.
S.PHON: at aupa minnadiipin naia kudadaðain ɕia l~ɬukis saia at.
S.FORM: at aupa minnadiipin naia kudadazain sia lukis saia at.
S.PHON: at aupa minnadiipin naia kudadaðain ɕia l~ɬukis saia at.
S.TRANSL: 然後,他們到木頭上面了.
Then there, they went on the wood.

S.FORM: adiipin supahin a adiia sisiuha inkaduanin hai.
S.PHON: adiipin supax~χin a adiia ɕiɕiux~χa inkaduanin x~χai.
S.FORM: adiipin supahin a adiia sisiuha inkaduanin hai.
S.PHON: adiipin supax~χin a adiia ɕiɕiux~χa inkaduanin x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 找到了很多青蛙.
Many frogs were found there.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=改變狀態
可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: manaskalin naia ka supahang asia saias uvaaz tas'an mazmaz ka supah.
S.PHON: manaskal~ɬin naia ka supax~χaŋ aɕia saias uvaað tasʔan maðmað ka supax~χ.
S.FORM: manaskalin naia ka supahang asia saias uvaaz tas'an mazmaz ka supah.
S.PHON: manaskal~ɬin naia ka supax~χaŋ aɕia saias uvaað tasʔan maðmað ka supax~χ.
S.TRANSL: 他們高興了,因為他和孩子,兄弟姊妹之類的很多在那邊.
They became very happy because he and many children, siblings and the like were there.

S.FORM: mmm adiicia aupa dinamu naicia tu cina at.
S.PHON: mmm adiiʨia aupa dinamu naiʨia tu ʨina at.
S.FORM: mmm adiicia aupa dinamu naicia tu cina at.
S.PHON: mmm adiiʨia aupa dinamu naiʨia tu ʨina at.
S.TRANSL: 他們那裡就抓他們的母親.
There then they grabbed their mother.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.斜格

S.FORM: kasupah a maupa uvaaza tama adiia asia tu tama cina tama.
S.PHON: kasupax~χ a maupa uvaaða tama adiia aɕia tu tama ʨina tama.
S.FORM: kasupah a maupa uvaaza tama adiia asia tu tama cina tama.
S.PHON: kasupax~χ a maupa uvaaða tama adiia aɕia tu tama ʨina tama.
S.TRANSL: 爸爸媽媽有了很多很多那樣的孩子.
The father and mother had so many children.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: hai maupacia hai minaupacia at manaskalin a naia minaizin tu tas tu lumah maupacia supah tu asucias uvaazcia hai minaiza sisiuh.
S.PHON: x~χai maupaʨia x~χai minaupaʨia at manaskal~ɬin a naia minaiðin tu tas tu l~ɬumax~χ maupaʨia supax~χ tu asuʨias uvaaðʨia x~χai minaiða ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.FORM: hai maupacia hai minaupacia at manaskalin a naia minaizin tu tas tu lumah maupacia supah tu asucias uvaazcia hai minaiza sisiuh.
S.PHON: x~χai maupaʨia x~χai minaupaʨia at manaskal~ɬin a naia minaiðin tu tas tu l~ɬumax~χ maupaʨia supax~χ tu asuʨias uvaaðʨia x~χai minaiða ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.TRANSL: 他們很開心有了一個那麼多人的家庭,有狗和小孩,也有了青蛙.
They became so happy for the fact that there was a big family, with a dog, a child, and also a frog.

S.FORM: mmm maupacia tu maupacia hai.
S.PHON: mmm maupaʨia tu maupaʨia x~χai.
S.FORM: mmm maupacia tu maupacia hai.
S.PHON: mmm maupaʨia tu maupaʨia x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 這樣那樣的.
Like this, like that.

S.FORM: namudaanin naia antabanun a tasa mas asucia hai.
S.PHON: namudaanin naia antabanun a tasa mas asuʨia x~χai.
S.FORM: namudaanin naia antabanun a tasa mas asucia hai.
S.PHON: namudaanin naia antabanun a tasa mas asuʨia x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 他們準備要走了,他們一個被狗帶走.
They were leaving, the dog took one away.

W.TRANSL: 非實現=主焦-去-路=改變狀態

S.FORM: nasidahdain hai.
S.PHON: naɕidax~χdain x~χai.
S.FORM: nasidahdain hai.
S.PHON: naɕidax~χdain x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 他們要遠離.
They were leaving far off.

S.FORM: malala'la adiicia hai baibaiun naicia saicinun tu namudaanin.
S.PHON: mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa adiiʨia x~χai baibaiun naiʨia saiʨinun tu namudaanin.
S.FORM: malala'la adiicia hai baibaiun naicia saicinun tu namudaanin.
S.PHON: mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa adiiʨia x~χai baibaiun naiʨia saiʨinun tu namudaanin.
S.TRANSL: 他們向他們大喊大叫:「掰掰你們,再見!」就要走了.

TRANSL.notes: They shouted to them: "Bye-bye! See you!" (They) were leaving.

S.TRANSL: They shouted to them: "Bye-bye! See you!" were leaving.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.斜格
非實現=主焦-去-路=改變狀態

S.FORM: adiidau naia mi'ukuli masatu tundadaan.
S.PHON: adiidau naia miʔukul~ɬi masatu tundadaan.
S.FORM: adiidau naia mi'ukuli masatu tundadaan.
S.PHON: adiidau naia miʔukul~ɬi masatu tundadaan.
S.TRANSL: 看起來,他們在那邊被歡送了.
It looks like they were sent off there.

S.FORM: andii kusunun a sisiuh mudaan.
S.PHON: andii kusunun a ɕiɕiux~χ mudaan.
S.FORM: andii kusunun a sisiuh mudaan.
S.PHON: andii kusunun a ɕiɕiux~χ mudaan.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙被提著走.
The frog left while being held.

S.FORM: pangausun a asua.
S.PHON: paŋausun a asua.
S.FORM: pangausun a asua.
S.PHON: paŋausun a asua.
S.TRANSL: 狗被叫到前面.
The dog was made to walk in front.

S.FORM: kaupacia.
S.PHON: kaupaʨia.
S.FORM: kaupacia.
S.PHON: kaupaʨia.
S.TRANSL: 講完了.
That's it.
